mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kb_recent_access ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_recent_access (document_id, user_id, access_type, create_time) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{userId}, #{accessType}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_recent_access SET access_type = #{accessType} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM kb_recent_access WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND document_id = #{documentId}
